name: RL Circuit Time Constants
description: Analyze RL circuits with exponential current growth or decay using time constant τ = L/R
identification_signal: Circuits with inductors and resistors, questions about current over time during switching

strategy.step_2: Identify whether current is growing or decaying
strategy.step_4: Find maximum current from I_max = ε/R (growth) or initial current (decay)

front.text: Inductor in series with resistor, switch closed at t=0

back.title: RL Circuit Growth
back.explanation: Current grows exponentially with time constant τ = L/R

checkpoint.question: What are the units of τ?

steps.title: Initial and Final Conditions
steps.instruction: Inductor opposes change: I(0⁺) = I(0⁻). At steady state: inductor acts as wire.

problem_cards.prompt_latex: L = 2 \text{ H}, R = 4 \Omega, \mathcal{E} = 12 \text{ V}, t = 0.5 \text{ s}

solution.verification: At t=0, I=0. At t→∞, I→3 A. At t=τ, I ≈ 0.63×I_max ✓

what_mastery_means: Understand inductor behavior at t=0 and t=∞
